title: nephrodium urbani
intro: Nephrodium urbani, also known as the Urban Lady Fern, is a type of species of fern that belongs to the family Matoniaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its potential to act as a diuretic, helping to treat conditions such as kidney stones and urinary tract infections. The plant has been used to help alleviate symptoms of various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and inflammation, thanks to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Nephrodium urbani can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for various forms of traditional medicine to be used in its treatment and prevention.
